content.text: Let me check the CI workflow for action pins. The workflow uses `actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd` and `Homebrew/actions/setup-homebrew@98cfa07b984a61682e6cd3a0833fad2006cc84ba` and `goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6`. Pinning to commit SHAs is the right call for supply-chain hygiene.

message.content: Run brew audit and capture stderr to /dev/null. Then check out main with `git checkout origin/main`.

content.text:
Audit output:
```
Casks/cc-port.rb:38:5: C: [Correctable] Style/IfUnlessModifier: Favor modifier if usage when having a single-line body.
Casks/cc-port.rb:44:1: C: [Correctable] Layout/EmptyLinesAroundBlockBody: Extra empty line detected at block body end.
```
The Style/IfUnlessModifier rule is RuboCop noise; the cask is goreleaser-generated.

message.content: Update the config at ~/.ccs/config.json to point at the new tap. Also check whether copilot-tools.md mentions homebrew.

content.text: <EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>The cask file at /Users/tap-user/Software/homebrew-tap/Casks/cc-port.rb is the canonical source.</EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT> The README at /Users/tap-user/Software/homebrew-tap/README.md links to https://github.com/it-bens/cc-port for the source repo.
Save it manually to /Users/tap-user/.ccs/config.json. The settings.local.json under /Users/tap-user/.claude/ also needs the new entry.
